ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job type */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "default_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer has defaulted */,
  "balance" REAL /* Financial balance of the customer */,
  "household_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has household insurance */,
  "car_loan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a car loan */,
  "communication_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of communication */,
  "divorced" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is divorced */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is married */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's address */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel */,
  "preferred_contact_time" TEXT /* Preferred contact time */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings */,
  "marketing_consent" INTEGER /* Marketing consent */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Customer status (e.g., active, inactive, churned) */,
  "customer_lifetime_value" REAL /* Customer lifetime value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_communication_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("communication_type_id") REFERENCES communication_types ("communication_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job is in */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Job level (e.g., entry-level, mid-level, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the education was completed */,
  "year_of_completion" INTEGER /* Year of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_types" (
  "communication_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication type */,
  "communication_channel" TEXT /* Name of the communication channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the communication type */,
  "preferred_contact_time" TEXT /* Preferred contact times */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "contact_day" INTEGER /* Day of the last contact */,
  "contact_month" TEXT /* Month of the last contact */,
  "no_of_contacts" INTEGER /* Number of contacts made */,
  "days_passed" INTEGER /* Number of days passed since last contact */,
  "prev_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of previous attempts */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "call_start" INTEGER /* Indicates if the call was started */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call */,
  "car_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has car insurance */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., sales, support, marketing) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Communication channel used */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent who handled the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the interaction */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_outcome" TEXT /* Target outcome of the campaign */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome achieved */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment targeted */,
  "target_segment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target segment */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_customer_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the agent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the customer segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privacy_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privacy policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the privacy policy */,
  "policy_text" TEXT /* Text of the privacy policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the privacy policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the privacy policy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_privacy" (
  "customer_privacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer privacy setting */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the privacy policy */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer has given consent */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_privacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_privacy_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_privacy_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES privacy_policies ("policy_id")
)
